description: Idea-to-execution clarification: brainstorm fuzzy ideas into approved designs, grill requirements until zero ambiguity, deliberate the implementation approach with a blind four-persona round, decide visual choices with mockups, validate whole experiences with an interactive clickable demo, then emit milestone-grouped single-prompt task cards. Outputs live under taskmaster-docs/ (no collision with a project's own docs/).

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)
out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
Idea-to-execution clarification: brainstorm fuzzy ideas into approved design docs, batched clarifying questions against an ambiguity ledger, consent-gated theme-aware shell mockups (full / ASCII-only / none, asked once per session) rendered in the project’s own colors when detectable, with compare modes, tradeoff callouts, and motion passes, on a single always-live auto-reload preview URL for visual decisions, interactive clickable walkthrough demos for whole experiences (multi-screen flows, states, failure exits), then a spec and milestone-grouped single-prompt task cards. Includes /taskmaster:task, /taskmaster:brainstorm, /taskmaster:coverage, /taskmaster:redteam, context-scout and spec-adversary agents, and a thin-feature-prompt reminder hook. Pairs with stack-scan, task-runner, and code-architecture for the full workflow (see README).

Codex fidelity: 10 faithful, 9 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Idea-to-execution clarification: brainstorm fuzzy ideas into approved designs, grill requirements until zero ambiguity, deliberate the implementation approach with a blind four-persona round, decide visual choices with mockups, validate whole experiences with an interactive clickable demo, then emit milestone-grouped single-prompt task cards. Outputs live under taskmaster-docs/ (no collision with a project's own docs/).

name: taskmaster
